message:
feat(v2): Phase 1-3 — tool depth, streaming, UI (90% implementation depth)

Phase 1 — Tool Depth:
  Bash: timeout+kill, background, 1MB limit, ANSI strip
  Read: binary detect, 2000 line limit, PDF pages, line numbers
  Edit: replace_all, uniqueness check, require Read first
  Write: parent mkdir, overwrite protection
  Glob: proper glob matching, mtime sort, dir scoping
  Grep: -i/-n/-A/-B/-C, output_mode, glob/type filter, ripgrep
  Agent: subagent_type, worktree isolation, background, model override

Phase 2 — Streaming & Context:
  All SSE events (message_start/delta/stop, content_block_*)
  Thinking blocks, tool_use input_json_delta streaming
  Micro-compaction (stale tool results >5 turns)
  CLAUDE.md multi-directory loading with cache boundary

Phase 3 — UI:
  Spinner, colors, code blocks, markdown rendering
  Status line (model, tokens, cost)
  All CLI args (--model, --print, --permission-mode, etc.)
  All 39 slash commands fully implemented

491 tests passing. Verified: Write→Read→Edit→Read chain works.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
